Title: [CRITICAL] Rotate exposed credentials in .env.local
Description:
Production secrets committed to repository including Stripe live keys, OpenAI API keys, Anthropic keys, and database credentials. CVSS: 9.8

**File:** .env.local
**Action:**
1. Rotate ALL credentials at provider dashboards
2. Purge git history with BFG or git filter-branch
3. Add .env.local to .gitignore

**Evidence:** specs/05-SECURITY-AUDIT.md
